## Summary

- describe the change
- describe the impact

## Release Type

- [ ] `feat:` for a new user-facing feature
- [ ] `fix:` for a bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` for documentation-only changes
- [ ] `refactor:` for internal code restructuring
- [ ] `chore:` for maintenance work
- [ ] breaking change: use `!` in the PR title and explain it below

## PR Title

Use a Conventional Commit title for this PR. Examples:

- `feat: add multiple correct answers`
- `fix: restore mobile reconnect after screen lock`
- `docs: clarify release workflow`
- `feat!: change quiz schema for multi-answer questions`

## Testing

- describe what you tested
- note if testing was not possible

## Breaking Changes

- none
